description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:16 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define two stages: install and deploy. In the install stage add an install_build job that runs `yarn` then `yarn build`, saves the node_modules/ folder as an artifact, and runs only when files under src/** or public/** change on the main branch. In the deploy stage add a nixos job that triggers the downstream pipeline nix17/nixos-config, sets the variables PACKAGE_NAME=silver_datawars2-frontend and UPDATE_FLAKE=yes, and also runs only on changes to src/** or public/** on the main branch.
